Name: ATOBARRIER365 Cream Moisturizer with Ceramides & Niacinamide for Skin Moisture Barrier Repair
Description: What it is: A dermatologist-tested, rich cream that supports and nourishes and delivers up to 120 hours of hydration. Skin Type: Normal and Dry Skincare Concerns: Dryness Formulation: Cream Highlighted Ingredients: - Patented Barrier-Boosting Ceramides Blend: High-density ceramides fill moisture gaps in sensitive skin for hydration. - Capsule Technology: Keeps ceramides in the skin barrier longer for hydration. - Triple Lipid Complex: Ceramides, fatty acids, and cholesterol mimic lipids to moisturize. Ingredient Callouts: Free of parabens, formaldehydes, formaldehyde-releasing agents, phthalates, mineral oil, retinyl palmitate, oxybenzone, coal tar, hydroquinone, sulfates SLS & SLES, triclocarban, triclosan, and contains less than one percent synthetic fragrance. It is also vegan and gluten-free. What Else You Need to Know: AESTURA is the #1 derm-recommended brand in Korea for sensitive skin. The cream contains barrier-boosting ceramides that are delivered to skin through unique capsule technology. It is suitable for use after microneedling treatments and reduces hydration loss, visible redness and roughness post-microneedling. ATOBARRIER365 Cream is non-comedogenic, fragrance-free, alcohol-free, dermatologist-tested. It is recognized by the National Eczema Association with the Seal of Acceptance. Clinical Results: In an instrumental result, 32 women, after one application: - Provides 120 hours of hydration - Strengthens barrier by +39.2% - Improves flakiness by +39.7% - 100% showed improvement in skin barrier In a self-scoring, four-week clinical study on 22 women, after four weeks: - Skin sensitivity reduced by 51% Result after repeated tape-stripping, baseline vs. four weeks, on 32 women: - Skin's natural ability to defend itself from damage improved by 38% In a self-scoring clinical study on 32 women, after four weeks: - Subjects felt +132% improvement in hydration and +152% improvement in dryness In a self-assessment on 32 women, after four weeks of daily use: - 96% agree skin barrier feels protected - 96% agree skin has a healthy glow - 93% agree skin barrier feels healthier
